title: Future of Marketing Briefing: Memes used to be a joke. Now they’re a strategy
description: Last month, a U.S. Special Forces soldier was indicted for insider trading — not on stocks, but on a prediction market. He had detailed knowledge of a military operation. He bet on it. The platform where he placed those bets responded to the indictment with something close to a shrug. That shrug tells you everything […]
title_en: Memes evolve from joke to legitimate marketing strategy for brands
summary_ko: 밈이 단순한 농담에서 브랜드의 진지한 마케팅 전략으로 발전하고 있습니다. 특정 사례가 언급되었지만 원문 내용이 제한적입니다. 이는 디지털 마케팅의 패러다임 변화를 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Memes are transitioning from simple jokes to serious marketing strategies for brands. While specific cases are mentioned, the source content is limited. This represents a paradigm shift in digital marketing approaches.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 밈 마케팅을 통해 젊은 소비자층과 더 자연스럽고 비용 효율적인 커뮤니케이션을 구축할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage meme marketing to build more natural and cost-effective communication with younger consumer segments.
key_points: Memes are becoming strategic marketing tools rather than casual content
Represents shift in digital marketing paradigms
Offers new engagement opportunities for brands
one_line_insight_ko: 밈이 마케팅 전략으로 진화하면서 D2C 브랜드에게 새로운 고객 참여 기회를 제공합니다.
one_line_insight_en: The evolution of memes into marketing strategy provides D2C brands with new customer engagement opportunities.

title: Target shuffles merchandising leadership with slate of new SVPs
description: The mass retailer continues to revamp its leadership team as it works to regain product authority.
title_en: Target reshuffles merchandising leadership with new SVP appointments
summary_ko: 타겟이 제품 권위를 되찾기 위한 노력의 일환으로 머천다이징 리더십을 개편하고 있습니다. 여러 새로운 SVP들이 임명되었습니다. 이는 타겟의 지속적인 리더십 팀 개편의 일부입니다.
summary_en: Target is reshuffling its merchandising leadership as part of efforts to regain product authority. Several new SVPs have been appointed. This continues Target's ongoing leadership team revamp.
so_what_ko: 대형 리테일러의 머천다이징 리더십 변화는 제품 전략과 고객 경험 개선에 대한 업계 트렌드를 반영합니다.
so_what_en: Leadership changes in major retailers reflect industry trends toward improving product strategy and customer experience.
key_points: Target appointing new SVPs in merchandising leadership
Part of broader effort to regain product authority
Continues ongoing leadership team restructuring
one_line_insight_ko: 타겟의 머천다이징 리더십 개편은 제품 중심 전략으로의 회귀를 시사합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Target's merchandising leadership reshuffle signals a return to product-centric strategy.

title: Medline Q1 results show expanding AI use, tariff concerns
description:
Medline Inc. is expanding its use of artificial intelligence (AI), digital supply chain software and robotics as it supports higher demand from new customer wins. In its first quarter of 2026, the medical supply company reported double‑digit sales growth, driven by new customer implementations and continued strength in its Supply Chain Solutions segment, executives said. […]
The post Medline Q1 results show expanding AI use, tariff concerns appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Medline expands AI use amid strong Q1 growth and tariff concerns
summary_ko: 메드라인이 AI, 디지털 공급망 소프트웨어, 로봇 기술 사용을 확대하고 있습니다. 2026년 1분기에 신규 고객 확보와 공급망 솔루션 부문 강세로 두 자릿수 매출 성장을 기록했습니다. 관세 우려가 있지만 AI 투자를 지속하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Medline is expanding its use of AI, digital supply chain software, and robotics. The company reported double-digit sales growth in Q1 2026 driven by new customer wins and Supply Chain Solutions strength. Despite tariff concerns, AI investments continue.
so_what_ko: 의료용품 업계에서 AI와 로봇 기술 도입이 성장 동력이 되고 있어, D2C 브랜드도 운영 효율성과 고객 서비스 향상을 위한 AI 투자를 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: AI and robotics adoption is driving growth in healthcare supplies, suggesting D2C brands should consider AI investments for operational efficiency and customer service enhancement.
key_points: Medline expanding AI, digital supply chain, and robotics use
Double-digit Q1 2026 sales growth from new customers
Continued AI investment despite tariff concerns
one_line_insight_ko: 메드라인의 AI 확장 투자는 공급망 최적화가 매출 성장의 핵심 동력임을 보여줍니다.
one_line_insight_en: Medline's AI expansion demonstrates that supply chain optimization is key to revenue growth.

title: Ulta Beauty joins Uber Eats marketplace, expanding delivery options
description:
Ulta Beauty has become the latest retailer to join the Uber Eats marketplace, which enables the retailer to capitalize on same-day delivery. The companies timed their announcement on May 7 before Mother’s Day, which this year falls on May 10. Ulta Beauty joins a growing list of retailers using last-mile delivery platforms and marketplaces (which […]
The post Ulta Beauty joins Uber Eats marketplace, expanding delivery options appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Ulta Beauty partners with Uber Eats for same-day delivery expansion
summary_ko: 울타 뷰티가 우버 이츠 마켓플레이스에 합류하여 당일 배송 서비스를 확대했습니다. 5월 7일 어머니날을 앞두고 발표된 이 파트너십은 라스트마일 배송 플랫폼을 활용하는 리테일러 증가 추세를 보여줍니다. 이는 울타 뷰티의 배송 옵션 다양화 전략입니다.
summary_en: Ulta Beauty has joined the Uber Eats marketplace to expand same-day delivery options. The partnership was announced on May 7 ahead of Mother's Day, showing the growing trend of retailers using last-mile delivery platforms. This represents Ulta Beauty's strategy to diversify delivery options.
so_what_ko: 뷰티 브랜드의 온디맨드 배송 플랫폼 활용은 즉시성을 중시하는 소비자 니즈에 대응하는 중요한 전략이며, D2C 뷰티 브랜드도 유사한 배송 파트너십을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Beauty brands leveraging on-demand delivery platforms is crucial for meeting consumer demand for immediacy, and D2C beauty brands should consider similar delivery partnerships.
key_points: Ulta Beauty joins Uber Eats marketplace for same-day delivery
Timed announcement before Mother's Day for strategic impact
Part of growing trend of retailers using delivery platforms
one_line_insight_ko: 울타 뷰티의 우버 이츠 파트너십은 뷰티 업계에서 즉시 배송이 경쟁 우위의 핵심 요소임을 보여줍니다.
one_line_insight_en: Ulta Beauty's Uber Eats partnership shows that instant delivery is becoming a key competitive advantage in beauty retail.

title: Ecommerce Trends: How online retailers compete against Amazon
description:
After GameStop offered to acquire eBay on May 3 in a deal worth $56 billion, GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen framed the move as a path to help eBay compete against Amazon. “It could be a legit competitor to Amazon,” Cohen said in a Wall Street Journal report dated March 4. Part of Cohen’s strategy would […]
The post Ecommerce Trends: How online retailers compete against Amazon appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: GameStop's eBay acquisition proposal targets Amazon competition strategy
summary_ko: 게임스톱이 560억 달러 규모의 이베이 인수를 제안했습니다. CEO 라이언 코헨은 이를 아마존과 경쟁할 수 있는 합법적인 경쟁자로 만들기 위한 전략이라고 설명했습니다. 이는 아마존에 대항하는 온라인 리테일러들의 새로운 경쟁 전략을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: GameStop proposed a $56 billion acquisition of eBay. CEO Ryan Cohen framed this as a strategy to create a legitimate competitor to Amazon. This demonstrates new competitive strategies by online retailers against Amazon's dominance.
so_what_ko: 대형 플랫폼 통합을 통한 아마존 경쟁 전략은 D2C 브랜드들이 독립적인 판매 채널 구축과 플랫폼 다각화의 중요성을 인식해야 함을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: Platform consolidation strategies to compete with Amazon suggest D2C brands must recognize the importance of building independent sales channels and platform diversification.
key_points: GameStop proposes $56B acquisition of eBay to compete with Amazon
CEO Ryan Cohen sees this as creating legitimate Amazon competitor
Represents new strategies for online retailers against Amazon dominance
one_line_insight_ko: 게임스톱의 이베이 인수 제안은 아마존 독점에 대한 업계의 플랫폼 통합 대응 전략을 보여줍니다.
one_line_insight_en: GameStop's eBay acquisition proposal demonstrates the industry's platform consolidation strategy against Amazon's dominance.

title: Digital Marketing Optimization: 10 Best Strategies to Increase Marketing ROI
description: Digital marketing optimization plays a major role in whether a marketing program grows or remains stagnant. Most teams are running campaigns, tracking metrics, and still scratching their heads, wondering why the pipeline isn’t moving. Honestly? The problem usually comes down to process, not effort.
title_en: Digital Marketing Optimization: 10 Best Strategies to Increase Marketing ROI
summary_ko: 디지털 마케팅 최적화는 마케팅 프로그램의 성장에 핵심적 역할을 담당합니다. 많은 팀들이 캠페인을 운영하고 지표를 추적하지만 파이프라인이 움직이지 않는 이유를 파악하지 못합니다. 문제는 노력이 아닌 프로세스에 있는 경우가 대부분입니다.
summary_en: Digital marketing optimization plays a crucial role in whether marketing programs grow or stagnate. Many teams run campaigns and track metrics but struggle to understand why their pipeline isn't moving. The problem usually comes down to process, not effort.
so_what_ko: D2C 조직은 마케팅 ROI 향상을 위해 최적화 전략을 체계적으로 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C organizations need to systematically build optimization strategies to improve marketing ROI.
key_points: Marketing optimization is critical for program growth
Many teams struggle with pipeline movement despite efforts
Process improvement is key over just increasing effort
one_line_insight_ko: 마케팅 성과 개선의 핵심은 노력보다는 프로세스 최적화에 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: The key to improving marketing performance lies in process optimization rather than just effort.

title: #213: AI Answers - What AI Should Never Do, Enterprise Scaling, Governing AI & Navigating IT Roadblocks
description:
Leadership wants AI everywhere. IT security can't keep up. Marketing is racing ahead while legal and finance dig in. And every week brings another story of an AI agent doing something nobody told it to do. Paul Roetzer and Cathy McPhillips answer 15 listener questions on how to actually move organizations forward and where the real opportunities lie for individuals, SMBs, and enterprises right now.

00:00:00 — Intro

00:07:01 — How do you move a company out of AI policy paralysis?

00:08:54 — How should regulated, hands-on teams introduce AI?

00:12:30 — When companies are stuck, what tends to get them moving?

00:15:00 — Should IT security evolve to adopt AI quicker or should businesses slow down?

00:17:43 — What changes an AI-skeptic employee's mind?

00:21:18 — How should early-career professionals prioritize what to learn?

00:23:29 — Is there a point where you should stop learning and start building?

00:27:29 — Where do companies get stuck scaling AI across departments?

00:29:4
title_en: AI Governance Challenges: Navigating Enterprise AI Adoption and IT Roadblocks
summary_ko: 기업 리더십은 AI를 모든 곳에 도입하려 하지만 IT 보안은 따라가지 못하고 있습니다. 마케팅은 앞서 나가는 반면 법무와 재무 부서는 신중한 접근을 보이고 있습니다. 매주 AI 에이전트가 예상치 못한 행동을 하는 사례들이 보고되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Leadership wants AI everywhere while IT security struggles to keep up. Marketing races ahead as legal and finance departments take cautious approaches. Weekly reports emerge of AI agents performing unexpected actions.
so_what_ko: D2C 조직은 AI 도입 시 부서 간 정책 조율과 리스크 관리 체계를 우선 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C organizations must prioritize cross-departmental policy coordination and risk management frameworks when adopting AI.
key_points: Leadership pushes for widespread AI adoption while IT security lags
Marketing departments are leading AI implementation efforts
Legal and finance teams remain cautious about AI rollout
Regular incidents of AI agents acting unexpectedly
one_line_insight_ko: AI 도입 성공의 열쇠는 기술보다 조직 내 부서 간 정책 정렬에 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: The key to successful AI adoption lies in cross-departmental policy alignment rather than technology itself.

title: Luna Bar strategizes new era with social ads starring Jessica Alba
description: The Mondelēz-owned snack bar brand’s “Easy to Love” campaign represents its first major creative push in nearly a decade.
title_en: Luna Bar Launches First Major Campaign in Decade with Jessica Alba
summary_ko: 몬델리즈 소유의 스낵바 브랜드 루나바가 제시카 알바를 앞세운 'Easy to Love' 캠페인을 론칭했습니다. 이는 브랜드가 거의 10년 만에 선보이는 첫 번째 대규모 크리에이티브 캠페인입니다. 소셜 광고를 통해 새로운 시대를 위한 전략을 구축하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Mondelēz-owned snack bar brand Luna Bar launched the 'Easy to Love' campaign featuring Jessica Alba. This represents the brand's first major creative push in nearly a decade. The brand is strategizing for a new era through social advertising.
so_what_ko: 유명 연예인을 활용한 브랜드 리뉴얼은 D2C 브랜드의 시장 재진입 전략으로 참고할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Celebrity-driven brand renewal can serve as a reference for D2C brands' market re-entry strategies.
key_points: First major campaign in nearly a decade for Luna Bar
Jessica Alba stars in 'Easy to Love' social campaign
Focus on social advertising for brand revitalization
one_line_insight_ko: 오랜 침묵 후 유명인 마케팅으로 브랜드 부활을 시도하는 전략이 주목받고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: The strategy of reviving brands through celebrity marketing after long periods of silence is gaining attention.

title: Papa Johns’ CMO on driving cultural relevance with a ‘Toy Story’ tie-up
description: Jenna Bromberg digs into recent moves around marketing co-ops and agency partners and how the chain is working with Google Cloud on AI.
title_en: Papa Johns CMO Discusses Cultural Relevance Strategy and Google Cloud AI Partnership
summary_ko: 파파존스의 CMO 제나 브롬버그가 토이스토리 타이업을 통한 문화적 관련성 확보 전략을 설명했습니다. 마케팅 협업과 에이전시 파트너십에 대한 최근 움직임을 다뤘습니다. 구글 클라우드와 AI 분야에서 협업하고 있다고 밝혔습니다.
summary_en: Papa Johns CMO Jenna Bromberg explained the strategy for achieving cultural relevance through a Toy Story tie-up. She discussed recent moves around marketing cooperatives and agency partnerships. The company is working with Google Cloud on AI initiatives.
so_what_ko: 문화적 콘텐츠와의 협업과 AI 기술 도입은 D2C 브랜드의 고객 참여도 향상에 핵심적 역할을 할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Collaboration with cultural content and AI technology adoption can play key roles in improving D2C brand customer engagement.
key_points: Toy Story partnership drives cultural relevance
Focus on marketing co-ops and agency partnerships
Collaboration with Google Cloud on AI initiatives
one_line_insight_ko: 문화적 콘텐츠와 AI 기술을 결합한 마케팅이 새로운 고객 연결점을 만들고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Marketing that combines cultural content with AI technology is creating new customer connection points.

title: Amazon, LinkedIn help advertisers reach professionals via CTV ads
description: As part of a new collaboration, marketers can run the networking platform’s CTV ad campaigns using Amazon DSP.
title_en: Amazon and LinkedIn Partner to Enable Professional Targeting via CTV Advertising
summary_ko: 아마존과 링크드인이 새로운 협업을 통해 광고주들이 CTV 광고를 통해 전문직 타겟층에 도달할 수 있도록 지원합니다. 마케터들은 아마존 DSP를 사용하여 링크드인의 CTV 광고 캠페인을 운영할 수 있습니다. 이는 네트워킹 플랫폼과 커머스 플랫폼의 협력 사례입니다.
summary_en: Amazon and LinkedIn are collaborating to help advertisers reach professional audiences through CTV advertising. Marketers can run LinkedIn's CTV ad campaigns using Amazon DSP. This represents a partnership between networking and commerce platforms.
so_what_ko: 플랫폼 간 협력을 통한 정교한 타겟팅은 D2C 브랜드의 B2B 고객 확보 전략에 새로운 기회를 제공합니다.
so_what_en: Sophisticated targeting through platform partnerships offers new opportunities for D2C brands' B2B customer acquisition strategies.
key_points: Amazon and LinkedIn collaboration for professional targeting
CTV advertising reaches professional audiences
Amazon DSP integration with LinkedIn campaigns
one_line_insight_ko: 플랫폼 간 데이터 결합으로 정밀한 전문직 타겟팅이 CTV 광고의 새로운 표준이 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Cross-platform data integration for precise professional targeting is becoming the new standard in CTV advertising.

title: How to earn customer trust in the age of AI
description:
Strong customer relationships are built through consistent actions, shared goals, and a genuine commitment to customer success.
The post How to earn customer trust in the age of AI appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: How to Earn Customer Trust in the Age of AI
summary_ko: AI 시대에 고객 신뢰를 구축하려면 일관된 행동과 공유된 목표, 진정한 고객 성공 몰입이 필요합니다. 강력한 고객 관계는 단순한 AI 기술 도입이 아닌 고객과의 지속적인 상호작용을 통해 형성됩니다. AI를 활용하면서도 인간 중심적 접근 방식을 유지하는 것이 핵심입니다.
summary_en: Building customer trust in the AI era requires consistent actions, shared goals, and genuine commitment to customer success. Strong customer relationships are formed through continuous interactions rather than mere AI technology adoption. The key is maintaining a human-centric approach while leveraging AI capabilities.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 도구 도입 시 고객 신뢰 유지를 위해 투명성과 일관성을 우선시해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must prioritize transparency and consistency to maintain customer trust when implementing AI tools.
key_points: Customer trust requires consistent actions and shared goals
AI implementation must maintain human-centric approach
Genuine commitment to customer success builds strong relationships
one_line_insight_ko: AI 시대에도 고객 신뢰는 기술이 아닌 일관된 고객 중심 행동을 통해 구축됩니다.
one_line_insight_en: Customer trust in the AI era is built through consistent customer-centric actions, not technology alone.

title: Why AI personalization strategies fail
description:
Most personalization plans collapse during execution because operational realities don't match the vision.
The post Why AI personalization strategies fail appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: 대부분의 AI 개인화 전략은 실행 단계에서 실패합니다. 비전과 운영 현실 사이의 격차로 인해 계획이 무너집니다. 성공적인 개인화를 위해서는 운영 역량과 전략적 목표의 일치가 필수적입니다.
summary_en: Most AI personalization strategies fail during execution due to misalignment between vision and operational realities. The gap between strategic goals and operational capabilities causes plans to collapse. Successful personalization requires alignment between operational capacity and strategic objectives.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업은 개인화 전략 수립 시 실행 가능성을 먼저 검토하고 운영 역량을 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies must assess execution feasibility first and build operational capabilities when developing personalization strategies.
key_points: Personalization plans often collapse during execution
Vision-reality gap causes strategy failures
Operational alignment is crucial for success
one_line_insight_ko: AI 개인화 성공의 핵심은 비전이 아닌 실행 가능한 운영 역량에 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI personalization success lies in executable operational capabilities, not vision alone.

title: Moving beyond silos to align complex customer journeys
description:
Complex campaigns break down when platforms, channels, and data flows fall out of sync. Martech helps keep customer journeys aligned.
The post Moving beyond silos to align complex customer journeys appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Moving Beyond Silos to Align Complex Customer Journeys
summary_ko: 복잡한 캠페인은 플랫폼, 채널, 데이터 흐름이 동기화되지 않을 때 실패합니다. 마케팅 기술은 고객 여정을 일치시키는 데 도움이 됩니다. 사일로를 넘어선 통합적 접근 방식이 고객 경험 개선의 핵심입니다.
summary_en: Complex campaigns break down when platforms, channels, and data flows fall out of sync. Marketing technology helps keep customer journeys aligned. An integrated approach beyond silos is key to improving customer experience.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 옴니채널 고객 여정 관리를 위해 통합 마케팅 기술 스택 구축이 필수적입니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must build integrated marketing technology stacks for effective omnichannel customer journey management.
key_points: Campaign success requires synchronized platforms and data flows
Martech enables aligned customer journeys
Breaking down silos improves customer experience
one_line_insight_ko: 복잡한 고객 여정 관리는 사일로 해체와 기술 통합을 통해서만 가능합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Complex customer journey management is only possible through silo elimination and technology integration.

title: AI SEO punishes lazy marketing strategies by Brick Marketing
description:
AI-driven search draws on broader signals, exposing gaps in fragmented campaigns and favoring brands with a consistent, cross-channel presence.
The post AI SEO punishes lazy marketing strategies appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: AI SEO Punishes Lazy Marketing Strategies
summary_ko: AI 기반 검색은 더 광범위한 신호를 활용하여 파편화된 캠페인의 취약점을 드러냅니다. 일관된 크로스 채널 존재감을 가진 브랜드를 선호합니다. 게으른 마케팅 전략은 AI SEO에서 처벌받게 됩니다.
summary_en: AI-driven search draws on broader signals, exposing gaps in fragmented campaigns. It favors brands with consistent cross-channel presence. Lazy marketing strategies face punishment in AI SEO environments.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI SEO 대응을 위해 모든 채널에서 일관된 브랜드 메시지와 품질 높은 콘텐츠 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must develop consistent brand messaging and high-quality content strategies across all channels to respond to AI SEO.
key_points: AI search exposes gaps in fragmented marketing campaigns
Consistent cross-channel presence is favored
Lazy marketing strategies face AI SEO penalties
one_line_insight_ko: AI SEO 시대에는 채널 간 일관성 없는 마케팅 전략이 더 이상 통하지 않습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Inconsistent cross-channel marketing strategies no longer work in the AI SEO era.

title: US agentic sales to reach $1T by 2030: report
description: But even as the technology grows in popularity, the physical shopping experience will remain important, per a new report.
title_en: US Agentic Sales to Reach $1T by 2030: Report
summary_ko: 미국의 에이전틱 커머스 매출이 2030년까지 1조 달러에 도달할 것으로 예상됩니다. 기술의 인기가 높아지고 있음에도 불구하고 물리적 쇼핑 경험은 여전히 중요할 것입니다. AI 에이전트 기반 판매가 급격한 성장세를 보이고 있습니다.
summary_en: US agentic commerce sales are expected to reach $1 trillion by 2030. Despite growing technology popularity, physical shopping experiences will remain important. AI agent-based sales are showing rapid growth trajectory.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 에이전틱 커머스 급성장에 대비해 AI 에이전트 기반 판매 채널 구축과 동시에 오프라인 경험도 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must build AI agent-based sales channels while strengthening offline experiences to prepare for rapid agentic commerce growth.
key_points: US agentic sales projected to reach $1 trillion by 2030
Physical shopping experience remains important
AI agent technology gaining popularity
one_line_insight_ko: 에이전틱 커머스가 1조 달러 시장으로 성장하면서 AI 기반 자동화 판매가 주류가 될 것입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Agentic commerce will become mainstream as it grows into a $1 trillion market with AI-powered automated sales.
